TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bhring, title = Bhring, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bhring} }

S.FORM: bhring pusu kari nii o biyax bgihur. seejiq mkla balay tmsamat o tmbhring balay samat ksun. knkla na tmsamat o aji mnda snlhayan na, kiya ni ensaan dha peeru mangal seejiq mkla balay tmsamat, kari nii o msriqu balay klaan ni srngaw. yasa ana manu klgan knkla o asi ka mnda snlhayan, manu saw kiya ni mkmpbhring quri samat ka seejiq o asi ka musa miing seejiq mkla balay tmsamat, usa na pbhring hyaan. kingal tmbhring balay samat o asi ka mugaya balay, yasa dgiyaq ssaun dha o ki ka pusu psgeegan ta ita Truku, ini pgaya ka seejiq o musa tmsamat siida, nais aji wada priyax dgiyaq do wada uqun samat aji uri o smtrung saw smtali strngun. saw nii ka seejiq aji meangal bhring ana bitaq knuwan. nasi mkmpbhring sunan ka seejiq tmbhring bi samat o tjiyal qlubung na siida ka samat o ini na pllayi musa mangal ni
S.PHON: bħɾiŋ pusu kaɾi nii o bijax bgiħuɾ. səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat o tmbħɾiŋ balaj samat ksun. knkla na tmsamat o aɟi mnda snlħajan na, kija ni ənsaan dħa pəəɾu maŋal səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat, kaɾi nii o msɾiqu balaj klaan ni sɾŋaw. jasa ana manu klgan knkla o asi ka mnda snlħajan, manu saw kija ni mkmpbħɾiŋ quɾi samat ka səəɟiq o asi ka musa miiŋ səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat, usa na pbħɾiŋ ħjaan. kiŋal tmbħɾiŋ balaj samat o asi ka mugaja balaj, jasa dgijaq ssaun dħa o ki ka pusu psgəəgan ta ita tɾuku, ini pgaja ka səəɟiq o musa tmsamat siida, nais aɟi wada pɾijax dgijaq do wada uqun samat aɟi uɾi o smtɾuŋ saw smtali stɾŋun. saw nii ka səəɟiq aɟi məaŋal bħɾiŋ ana bitaq knuwan. nasi mkmpbħɾiŋ sunan ka səəɟiq tmbħɾiŋ bi samat o tɟijal qlubuŋ na siida ka samat o ini na pllaji musa maŋal ni
S.FORM: bhring pusu kari nii o biyax bgihur. seejiq mkla balay tmsamat o tmbhring balay samat ksun. knkla na tmsamat o aji mnda snlhayan na, kiya ni ensaan dha peeru mangal seejiq mkla balay tmsamat, kari nii o msriqu balay klaan ni srngaw. yasa ana manu klgan knkla o asi ka mnda snlhayan, manu saw kiya ni mkmpbhring quri samat ka seejiq o asi ka musa miing seejiq mkla balay tmsamat, usa na pbhring hyaan. kingal tmbhring balay samat o asi ka mugaya balay, yasa dgiyaq ssaun dha o ki ka pusu psgeegan ta ita Truku, ini pgaya ka seejiq o musa tmsamat siida, nais aji wada priyax dgiyaq do wada uqun samat aji uri o smtrung saw smtali strngun. saw nii ka seejiq aji meangal bhring ana bitaq knuwan. nasi mkmpbhring sunan ka seejiq tmbhring bi samat o tjiyal qlubung na siida ka samat o ini na pllayi musa mangal ni
S.PHON: bħɾiŋ pusu kaɾi nii o bijax bgiħuɾ. səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat o tmbħɾiŋ balaj samat ksun. knkla na tmsamat o aɟi mnda snlħajan na, kija ni ənsaan dħa pəəɾu maŋal səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat, kaɾi nii o msɾiqu balaj klaan ni sɾŋaw. jasa ana manu klgan knkla o asi ka mnda snlħajan, manu saw kija ni mkmpbħɾiŋ quɾi samat ka səəɟiq o asi ka musa miiŋ səəɟiq mkla balaj tmsamat, usa na pbħɾiŋ ħjaan. kiŋal tmbħɾiŋ balaj samat o asi ka mugaja balaj, jasa dgijaq ssaun dħa o ki ka pusu psgəəgan ta ita tɾuku, ini pgaja ka səəɟiq o musa tmsamat siida, nais aɟi wada pɾijax dgijaq do wada uqun samat aɟi uɾi o smtɾuŋ saw smtali stɾŋun. saw nii ka səəɟiq aɟi məaŋal bħɾiŋ ana bitaq knuwan. nasi mkmpbħɾiŋ sunan ka səəɟiq tmbħɾiŋ bi samat o tɟijal qlubuŋ na siida ka samat o ini na pllaji musa maŋal ni
